title: An Act to Allow Veterans' Organizations and Fraternal Organizations to Obtain a License to Operate the Draw Game Keno
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Apr 29, 2025
last_house_action: 4/3/2025 - Committee on Veterans and Legal Affairs suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on VETERANS AND LEGAL AFFAIRS . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/29/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
